description: Composition Black full sleeves front zippered jacket, made of 100% polyester, has a mesh lining inside, adidas' patented 3-Stripes appliqued on the sleeves in white, white stripes on either side of chest, brand name and logo printed on left chest, and has side zippered pockets Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on prints/trims/embroidery Do not dry clean Sporty, cool and your best friend when it's a little chilly, this black jacket from adidas belongs in your wardrobe. Wear this jacket to college, for a biking trip or to office - basically wear it anywhere! The jacket is not just attractive, the mesh lining makes for excellent ventilation. Pair it with jeans and casual shoes for a chilled out look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
